heading: Notts Well vs Novar Gardens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Notts Well, South Australia and Novar Gardens, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Notts Well has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Novar Gardens (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Notts Well or Novar Gardens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Notts Well has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Novar Gardens scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Notts Well scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Novar Gardens scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Notts Well or Novar Gardens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Notts Well has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
